title: Remember the Time
why_this_song: Remember the Time by Michael Jackson (1991) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 54 times; first heard in: "Do you remember"
Appears 30 times; first heard in: "Do you remember the time?"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "When we fell in love"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "When we first met, girl"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "We'd be together all day long (I bet you remember)"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "remember" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "remember" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "time" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "time" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Do you remember the time? (Oh, I)

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Remember the Time" was released in 1991. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Remember the Time" foi lançada em 1991. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Remember the Time" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Remember the Time" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
